daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Day: Multiple Launches and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Potential aurora visibility at high latitudes with Kp 4.33 on March 6.
top_events.action: Check conditions for aurora viewing at high latitudes.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 10-40 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 will launch Starlink Group 10-40 satellites.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for the launch.

top_events.title: KAIROS | Flight 3 Launch
top_events.description: Third flight of the KAIROS launch vehicle carrying 5 satellites.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for the launch.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
